items.summary: Add a new final section at the very bottom of the Home page (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx), after all existing sections, that displays an inquiries/advertising contact callout matching the content shown in the provided image: "FOR INQUIRIES & ADVERTISING: aryananilshinde6122009@gmail.com".
In the new Home page bottom section, render the email address as a clickable mailto link (mailto:aryananilshinde6122009@gmail.com) and provide a simple UI affordance to copy the email to clipboard.
